commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh But my servant Caleb, because he had another spirit with him, and has followed me fully, him will I bring into the land in which he went; and his descendants shall possess it. The spirit of obedience and of courage. (Menochius) Followed me, as a guide, and hath fulfilled all my desires. (Vatable) This he was enabled to do by God's free grace. But his co-operation merited a reward. Augustine, de Grat. ) (Worthington).
